# hvlcs
TEAM: Emma Baumgartner, 83178781 August Williams, 54466017

Instructions to compile/build the code:

* Clone the repository
* This project does not require additional installations.
* Example Input:
  3<br/>
  a 2<br/>
  b 4<br/>
  c 5<br/>
  aacb<br/>
  caab<br/>
  Example Output:
  9<br/>
  cb<br/>
* Example input and output files are in data folder for replication purposes
* To generate data, run random_gen.py.
### Question 1

See Code

![][image1]

### Question 2

Recurrence equation  
Opt(i, j) \= {   
0						if i \= 0 / if no matches  
	opt(i+1, j+1) \+ vA\[i\]				if Ai \= Bj  
max(opt(i+1, j) \+ vA\[i\], opt(i, j+1) \+ vA\[j\])	if Ai \!= Bj / otherwise}

## Question 3

Pseudocode  
Max-Value-LCS(i, j, m, n,   
	for i=0 to m  
		M\[i, 0\] \= 0  
	for j \= 0 to n  
		M\[0,j\] \= 0  
	for i \= m-1 to 1, j=n-1 to 1  
		compute max(opt\[i+1\]\[j\] \+ vA\[i\], opt\[i\]\[j+1\] \+ vA\[j\])  
	return M\[0, 0\]

Our algorithm’s runtime is O(n\*m)

[image1]: <data:image/png;base64,>
